2604.27865.title: KellyBench: A Benchmark for Long-Horizon Sequential Decision Making
2604.27865.paper_summary: Language models are saturating benchmarks for procedural tasks with narrow objectives. But they are increasingly being deployed in long-horizon, non-stationary environments with open-ended goals. In this paper we introduce KellyBench, an environment for evaluating sequential decision-making in sports betting markets. Agents are placed in a sequential simulation of the 2023-24 English Premier League season and tasked with maximising their long-term bankroll growth. They are given detailed historical data, including advanced statistics, lineups, and public odds. To succeed they must build machine learning models, identify edge in public markets, and adapt as the environment changes over time. We find that all frontier models evaluated lose money on average over the course of the season for five seeds. The best performing model achieves an average return of -8%, and many models experiencing ruin across seeds. To judge strategy sophistication, we use a human expert rubric to grade each model and find their approaches to be unsophisticated compared to human baselines; Claude Opus 4.6 achieves a rubric score of 26.5%, which means there is significant room for improvement. KellyBench is available as an open-access API endpoint at https://openreward.ai/GeneralReasoning/KellyBench.
2604.27865.paper_summary_zh: 語言模型在具有狹窄目標的程序性任務基準中已經達到飽和。<lb/>但它們越來越多地被部署在具有開放式目標的長期、非穩定環境中。<lb/>在本文中，我們介紹了KellyBench，一個用於評估體育博彩市場中序列決策的環境。<lb/>代理被放置在2023-24英超聯賽賽季的序列模擬中，任務是最大化他們的長期資金增長。<lb/>他們獲得了詳細的歷史數據，包括先進統計數據、陣容和公共賠率。<lb/>要成功，他們必須建立機器學習模型，識別公共市場中的優勢，並隨著環境的變化而調整。<lb/>我們發現，在五個種子中，所有評估的前沿模型平均上都會虧損。<lb/>表現最好的模型實現了-8%的平均回報，許多模型在不同種子中遭遇了破產。<lb/>為了評估策略的複雜性，我們使用人類專家的標準來對每個模型進行評分，並發現它們的做法與人類基準相比顯得不夠成熟；Claude Opus 4.6的標準得分為26.5%，這意味著有很大的改進空間。<lb/>KellyBench作為開放訪問的API端點可在https://openreward.ai/GeneralReasoning/KellyBench獲得。
2604.27865.author: Thomas Grady et.al.
2604.27865.authors: Thomas Grady, Kip Parker, Iliyan Zarov, Henry Course, Chengxi Taylor, Ross Taylor
